title: China
html:
China

China is the country where Yahir spent his longest single travel stretch — roughly six months across mid-to-late 2024 — and the place his notes treat as the dividing line between "OSU student Yahir" and the founder he becomes by 2025. He arrived through the shanghai study abroad pipeline (visa scramble logged in 2024 05 13 things with ciee paperwork, mei dong correspondence, and a "get bag ready for Shanghai" line item), and he left on Dec 14 2024 making slides of his story that "don't seem real" (2024 12 14 departing china). The first explicit mention of "thinking about moving to China" actually appears two years earlier in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream, so the trip resolved a long-running internal question rather than an impulsive one.

Geography of the stay

Shanghai was the base. From there he ran weekend campaigns out to chengdu (Sept 2024 — Sichuan opera, Mt Qing Cheng, the famous "5th frog meal" at 97 CNY), xi an (Nov 2024 — terracotta warriors, biangbiang noodles, rou jia mo, yang rou paomo), and Beijing for the Great Wall (2024 09 05 shanghai sidequests). hangzhou and river towns appear as day-trip ideas in the 2024 10 22 valeria visit note. The pattern across these itineraries — sights / food / night life broken out by day — is consistent enough to be a template Yahir reuses.

Pattern-matching against the U.S.

China is also where Yahir starts doing comparative anthropology in real time. 2024 08 31 determinants of advanced countries is a 16-question rubric — can you flush toilet paper, are there vulture women, do they prioritize lifting, are the women outwardly stylish — that names the markers of development concept and is almost certainly a delta-from-Shanghai exercise. 2024 09 02 notes on the chinese crystallizes one observation: "they embrace exclusivity to a higher degree" — the seed of the exclusivity as chinese trait concept. 2024 10 22 valeria visit even smuggles in an intra industry trade homework question about Chinese imports/exports, blending lived experience with osu-style econ analysis.

Identity scaffolding built here

Two weeks before flying out, 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure distills what the chapter taught him into a personal creed: "Love like your soul is unraveling," "Take a chance, do it early, do it often," "Could be a great spy, business leader, travel content creator," and the stray dog and lightning bolt image. The departure note itself adds: "There was beauty in the solitude, beauty in the adventure, beauty in the unknown, uncomfortable, and in the transformation of a new normal." This is where fitfo, magnetic aura, and soul as beacon get named.

The product residue

China didn't just produce identity material — it produced product instincts. The 2024 12 21 todos BroMenu spec (precursor to brotein) explicitly cites alipay / wechat QR-scan UX as the inspiration for the camera flow. The 2026 01 13 rankett com notes about whitelabel, exclusivity, and tiered access read in retrospect like applied versions of what he saw in Chinese commercial life.

Open questions

What happened in the nine-month gap between leaving China (Dec 2024) and arriving austin tx (Sep 2025)? Are the "slides" he made on the flight out still archived anywhere? And the 2024 08 14 travel occurrences story-bank is curiously absent of China entries — meaning his best China stories may not yet be written down.
